clusters: array of cluster IDs as numbers
bindings: array of cluster IDs for server bindings

example.en: Press the button on your device three times
example.nl: Druk drie keer op de knop op uw apparaat
example.fr: Appuyez trois fois sur le bouton de votre appareil

unique_ids.description: All flow card IDs must be unique across entire app

device_token_in_titleFormatted.description: Device cards MUST include [[device]] token in titleFormatted

titleFormatted.required: Will be required in future SDK versions

publish.description: Full validation for App Store submission

zigbee_drivers: Always use official Homey Zigbee developer tools to interview devices
Include multiple manufacturer IDs if device has variants
Test pairing with actual devices before publishing
Implement attribute reporting for battery-powered devices
Use proper cluster IDs (numeric, not string)
Bind only necessary clusters to reduce network traffic
flow_cards: Include [[device]] token in all device cards
Provide clear argument labels and descriptions
Test flow cards in actual Flows before publishing
Use titleFormatted for better user experience
images: Use professional, consistent design across all driver images
Test image visibility at small sizes (75x75)
Use transparent backgrounds for driver icons
Optimize PNG files for smaller app size

Invalid image size.cause: Image dimensions don't match required specifications
Invalid image size.solution: Resize images to exact dimensions specified in image_specifications

Missing zigbee.learnmode.cause: Zigbee driver missing required learnmode field
Missing zigbee.learnmode.solution: Add learnmode object with instruction text to driver manifest

Duplicate flow card ID.cause: Multiple flow cards with same ID
Duplicate flow card ID.solution: Prefix all flow card IDs with driver name to ensure uniqueness

Missing [[device]] token.cause: Device flow card titleFormatted doesn't include [[device]]
Missing [[device]] token.solution: Add [[device]] token to titleFormatted for all device cards

Invalid cluster ID.cause: Cluster ID specified as string instead of number

homey_instance.description: Homey instance moved from global require to this.homey

flow_cards.description: Flow card API moved to this.homey.flow

changes: Improved Zigbee stack with better compatibility
